_comment: Per-rule allowlist for the BusTerminal IaC policy gate. Edits require justification and reviewer sign-off (see iac/policies/README.md). Adding an entry suppresses a specific gate failure; the run-policies orchestrator records consumed entries in its JSON report so reviewers can see what was bypassed.

BT-IAC-004.justification: Documented Complexity Tracking exception in specs/005-infrastructure-baseline/plan.md — pipeline managed identity holds subscription-wide Contributor so the bootstrap stack does not need a 'bootstrap-before-bootstrap' RG-scoped grant for every new env. Privilege surface is bounded by the condition-scoped RBAC-Admin grant below.

Documented Complexity Tracking exception in specs/005-infrastructure-baseline/plan.md — condition-scoped to a fixed role GUID allowlist in iac/platform-bootstrap/main.tf so the pipeline MI cannot assign Owner or any non-allowlisted role to itself or any other principal.

BT-IAC-007.justification: TEMPORARY (2026-07-01, dev cost control): one-time Premium→Basic downgrade of the dev ACR. zoneRedundancy is immutable so the SKU flip forces a replace. Images are rebuildable — cd-dev repushes on its next run; the AcrPull role assignment is replaced in the same apply (scope forces replacement). REMOVE this entry in a follow-up commit once the migration has applied, so future accidental ACR destroys are blocked again.
